tasks.context: Add pre-execution filter in backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts to reject non-coding tasks (docs/ADR/planning) before MiniMax invocation. Check task.type !== 'feature'|'bugfix'|'test' and return error immediately. Prevents 402P errors from wrong model usage.

In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts import and call existing task-complexity-validator before routing. Use validateTaskComplexity() to check file count, change scope, context length. Reject tasks exceeding thresholds with actionable error message.

In backend/src/services/task-complexity-validator.ts add rules: max 1 file per task, context <600 chars, no multi-file deliverables. Return specific rejection reasons (e.g. 'Task targets 3 files, max 1 allowed'). Must align with prompt constraints.

tasks.description: Add quality gate for task type enforcement
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/quality-gate-config.ts add gate 'task_type_valid' that checks task.type in ['feature','bugfix','test'] and agent='backend-core'|'frontend'|'agents'. Gate runs before orchestrator dispatch. Return gateId and clear error on failure.

tasks.description: Fix orchestrator error handling for validation failures
tasks.context: In backend/src/services/orchestrator.ts catch validation errors from task-complexity-validator and routing guard. Map to 400 status with structured JSON response {error, reason, suggestion}. Log to orchestrator event stream for CEO visibility.
